text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Eye Care 6 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Medicaid Recipients Care Care Expense Assistance Care Referrals Medicaid Recipients Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF COLUMBIA RIVER HEALTH HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Primary care community clinic. Services include general medical care, immunizations, annual exams, PAP tests, STD screening, contraceptive services, sports participation physicals, CDL physicals, and help applying for OHP and private insurance through the federal health exchange. Also coordinates dental, eye screening, and mental health care services for low-income patients. 450 Tatone Street Boardman, OR 97818 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email (541) 481-5444 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LEGACY HEALTH DEVERS MEMORIAL EYE INSTITUTE EYE CARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides general and specialty eye care, including exams, treatment, diagnostic testing, laser procedures, surgery, and low vision rehabilitation. 1040 NW 22nd Avenue Suite 168 Portland, OR 97210 Eligibility: Age 16 and older who meet income guidelines Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 413-8202 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PACIFIC UNIVERSITY PACIFIC EYE CLINIC BEAVERTON PACIFIC EYE CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Full-service clinic accepts members of the public on an appointment basis for eye/vision examinations. They provide complete vision and eye health examinations for glasses and contact lenses.
